title: Reign: Suffering Farming
description: Pain, suffering and the vibe of the real Middle Ages
body:
This server mod makes farming more difficult. Now crops grow only under the open sky - any block above it, including glass, will destroy the seed. Only the Sun and rays should be above it.

From the developers of [Reign](https://modrinth.com/mod/reignmod). ![Crown](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6e5083a09ddddca700e89647ce786e26c1a4a5b.png)
Stay tuned for more news in the [developer diary](https://t.me/reignmod),
and test the mod on [our server](https://t.me/reignserver)!

## No more greenhouses and underground gardens.
